untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Detection of '12-month high/center/low' price levels - no 252-bar lookback indicator available; (2) Market regime classification (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET) - not in allowed regime list; (3) Specific failure rates by condition (14%, 19%) - no threshold guidance provided; (4) Success rates marked AUTHOR_SILENT - cannot determine entry/exit thresholds. Pattern requires contextual market regime detection and historical relative price positioning not expressible with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is pattern-based and context-dependent, requiring market regime detection and multi-timeframe price positioning analysis that cannot be adequately translated using only the allowed indicators. A proper implementation would require: (a) Donchian channels over 252 bars to detect 12-month highs/lows, (b) regime classification logic, and (c) explicit success/failure rate thresholds from the source material.
